common.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
common.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.server: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.duplicate: An entry with this name already exists.

botanicalFamilies.title: Botanical Families
botanicalFamilies.listIntro: Botanical families group plant species by relationship and determine typical nutrient requirements. Click an entry to see details and associated species.
botanicalFamilies.createIntro: Create a new botanical family. Families group plant species with similar nutrient requirements.
botanicalFamilies.editIntro: Edit the properties of this botanical family. Changes affect all associated species.
botanicalFamilies.name: Name
botanicalFamilies.nameHelper: Botanical family name, must end with '-aceae' (e.g. 'Solanaceae')
botanicalFamilies.orderHelper: Taxonomic order, must end with '-ales' if provided (e.g. 'Solanales')
botanicalFamilies.descriptionHelper: Brief botanical description of the family
botanicalFamilies.nutrientDemandHelper: Typical nutrient requirements: Light feeder, Medium feeder or Heavy feeder
botanicalFamilies.nitrogenFixingHelper: Nitrogen-fixing families (e.g. Fabaceae) reduce fertilizer needs. Incompatible with Heavy feeder.
botanicalFamilies.rootDepthHelper: Typical root depth: Shallow (<30 cm), Medium (30–60 cm), Deep (>60 cm)
botanicalFamilies.soilPhHelper: pH range preference for optimal growth (3.0–9.0)
botanicalFamilies.frostToleranceHelper: Frost tolerance level of the family
botanicalFamilies.growthFormsHelper: Typical growth forms in the family, select at least one
botanicalFamilies.commonPestsHelper: Common pests for this family (press Enter to add)
botanicalFamilies.commonDiseasesHelper: Common fungal or bacterial diseases (press Enter to add)
botanicalFamilies.pollinationTypeHelper: Pollination types for this family, select at least one

species.title: Species
species.listIntro: Plant species form the foundation of master data. Each species belongs to a botanical family and can have multiple cultivars.
species.createIntro: Create a new plant species. The scientific name must follow binomial nomenclature (e.g. 'Solanum lycopersicum').
species.editIntro: Edit the properties of this plant species. Changes affect associated cultivars and lifecycle configurations.
species.scientificNameHelper: Binomial nomenclature: Genus + specific epithet (e.g. 'Solanum lycopersicum')
species.commonNamesHelper: Common names in any language (press Enter to add)
species.familyHelper: Associated botanical family — determines crop rotation and nutrient requirements
species.genusHelper: Botanical genus, first part of the scientific name (e.g. 'Solanum')
species.growthHabitHelper: Typical growth form: herb, shrub, tree, vine or groundcover
species.rootTypeHelper: Root system: fibrous, taproot, tuberous or bulbous
species.hardinessZonesHelper: USDA hardiness zones (e.g. '7a', '8b') — press Enter to add
species.nativeHabitatHelper: Original distribution area of the species (e.g. 'South America, Andes')
species.allelopathyScoreHelper: Biochemical interaction: −1 (strongly inhibiting) to +1 (strongly promoting), 0 = neutral
species.baseTempHelper: Threshold temperature for GDD calculation (Growing Degree Days), typically 5–15 °C
species.descriptionHelper: Brief botanical description of the species
species.synonymsHelper: Taxonomic synonyms / former scientific names (press Enter to add)
species.taxonomicAuthorityHelper: Original describer of the species per ICZN/ICN (e.g. 'L.' for Linnaeus)
species.taxonomicStatusHelper: Current status: accepted, synonym, doubtful, misapplied

cultivars.title: Cultivars
cultivars.editIntro: Edit the properties of this cultivar. Changes affect associated plant instances.
cultivars.name: Name
cultivars.breederHelper: Name of the breeder or seed company
cultivars.breedingYearHelper: Year of cultivar registration or first description
cultivars.patentStatusHelper: Protection status: e.g. 'PVP', 'Patent', 'Open Source', empty = unknown
cultivars.daysToMaturityHelper: Typical days from planting to harvest (1–365)

slots.title: Slots
slots.slotIdHelper: Format: LOCATION_POSITION, e.g. 'TENT01_A1' (automatically converted to uppercase)

substrates.title: Substrates
substrates.editIntro: Edit the properties of this substrate. Changes affect associated batches.
substrates.typeHelper: Substrate type determines water retention and buffer capacity
substrates.ecBaseHelper: Electrical conductivity of the base substrate in mS/cm
substrates.waterRetentionHelper: Ability of the substrate to retain water
substrates.airPorosityHelper: Percentage of air-filled pores in the substrate (0–100%)
substrates.bufferCapacityHelper: Ability of the substrate to buffer pH fluctuations
substrates.reusableHelper: Whether the substrate can be reused after treatment
substrates.maxReuseCyclesHelper: Maximum number of reuses before disposal

batches.title: Batches
batches.editIntro: Edit the properties of this substrate batch. Measurements (pH, EC, cycles) are tracked automatically.
batches.volumeHelper: Total volume of the batch in liters

plantInstances.title: Plant Instances
plantInstances.editIntro: Edit the associations of this plant. Instance ID and species cannot be changed.
plantInstances.plantNameHelper: Optional display name for this plant
plantInstances.cultivarKeyHelper: Select a cultivar for this species (optional)
plantInstances.substrateBatchKeyHelper: Key of the associated substrate batch

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: The requested page does not exist.
